<!-- Slide -->

#

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
::: {.content-area}

<h2><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub Projects</h2>

O GitHub Projects oferece uma estrutura leve de gestão Ágil integrada ao desenvolvimento de código.

::::: {.r-stack}

::: {.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
* **[Backlog:]{style="color:#008542"}** [_Issues_ representam histórias de usuário e tarefas]{style="color:#fdb913"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
* **[Planejamento de Sprint:]{style="color:#008542"}** [Marcos e iterações estruturam o trabalho]{style="color:#fdb913"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in-then-out style="margin-left: 0px;"}
* **[Fluxo de Trabalho:]{style="color:#008542"}** [Quadro Kanban]{style="color:#fdb913"}
  <br>[Proposto
    <br>
    → Rejeitado
    <br>
    → Backlog
    → Em Progresso
    → Revisão
    → Concluído
    (&#x2718;Cancelado)
    ]{style="font-size:0.7em !important;"}
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-in-then-out}
* **[Colaboração:]{style="color:#008542"}** [Pull requests, revisões e automações conectam código às tarefas]{style="color:#fdb913"}
:::

:::::

> [&#10004;]{style="color:#008542"} Transparência e rastreabilidade <br>
> [&#10004;]{style="color:#fdb913"} Alinhamento estratégico do planejamento à entrega.


:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-projects.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-projects-roadmap.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-projects-backlog.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-repository.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-repository-issues.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::

---

##

::: {.standard-slide}
::: {.left-bar}
:::
<h2 style="
    color: #008542;
    position: absolute;
    left: 50px;
"><i class="fa-brands fa-github "></i></h2>
::: {.content-area}

![](images/github-projects-issues.png){fig-align="center"}

:::
:::
